name: dream
description: Run temporal replay over rollout sessions and compile unresolved work into continuity memory.

interface.shortDescription: Run temporal replay and retrospective reasoning across sessions.
interface.longDescription: Dream keeps a running account of unresolved work across sessions by replaying rollout summaries sequentially, extracting blockers and open follow-ups, and writing continuity snapshots into SHORT.md, cache.md, handoff.md, and .dream-state.json.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Dream to replay pending rollout sessions and summarize what remains unfinished.
